description_long: This object is a freestanding A-frame advertising board with a sturdy, dark brown wooden frame and a black chalkboard surface. The front side features handwritten white chalk text and playful paw print graphics, suggesting it is used for informal or pet-related announcements. The rear side is a plain blackboard, framed by the same thick wooden border, with no visible writing or graphics. The board stands on two angled legs that form a stable triangular support, allowing it to be easily placed on sidewalks or in front of shops. The overall construction appears robust, with the frame providing both structural support and a decorative element. There are no visible illumination features or electronic components, indicating it is intended for use in well-lit environments.
description: A freestanding A-frame advertising board with a thick brown wooden frame and a black chalkboard surface, featuring handwritten chalk text and paw prints on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular A-frame structure and the thickness of the wooden legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the chalkboard surface with handwritten text and paw print graphics, framed by a thick brown wooden border.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the angled support legs and frame depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain blackboard surface within the same thick brown wooden frame, with no visible writing or graphics.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with rectangular corners
attribute_advertisement_content: handwritten chalk text and paw print graphics for informal or pet-related announcements
